name: Galera Therapeutics, Inc.
business: Galera Therapeutics is a biopharmaceutical company developing a pan-inhibitor of nitric oxide synthase (NOS) for certain types of advanced breast cancer, including metaplastic breast cancer (MpBC) and other refractory subsets of triple-negative breast cancer (TNBC). The company has no approved products and relies on third parties for clinical trials and manufacturing. It previously sold its dismutase mimetics assets to Biossil and now focuses on the pan-NOS inhibitor program.

exposures.sentence: Our lead program is a Phase 1/2 trial of the pan-NOS inhibitor in combination with nab-paclitaxel and alpelisib for MpBC.
